years_with_crohns.evidence: Diagnosed at 19... Seven years of hell.

treatment_journey.name: prednisone
treatment_journey.evidence: Started with mesalamine and prednisone. Prednisone triggered my first hypomanic episode.

treatment_journey.name: methotrexate
treatment_journey.evidence: Started methotrexate. Helped Crohn's but made me so nauseous.

treatment_journey.name: Humira
treatment_journey.evidence: Started Humira at 21... Chose intestines over skin. Now on Stelara.

treatment_journey.name: lamotrigine
treatment_journey.evidence: Current medication regimen: Stelara, lamotrigine, vitamin D, B12, iron, probiotic.

pathway_endpoint.reasoning: Now on Stelara. Helps both conditions somewhat.

referral_pathway.name: Health center
referral_pathway.evidence: Finally went to health center. They actually took it seriously. Referred immediately.
